ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Full name of the artist */,
  "artist_role" TEXT /* Role of the artist in creating the artwork */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the artist */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the artist */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "roles" TEXT /* Roles the artist has played */,
  "relationships" TEXT /* Relationships the artist has with other artists or entities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artwork_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork the image belongs to */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., thumbnail, full-size) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the full-size image */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail image */,
  "copyright_info" TEXT /* Copyright information for the image */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image */,
  "image_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "image_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the image */,
  "copyright_holder" TEXT /* Holder of the image's copyright */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artwork_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of metadata */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork the metadata belongs to */,
  "exhibition_history" TEXT /* History of exhibitions featuring the artwork */,
  "publication_history" TEXT /* History of publications featuring the artwork */,
  "conservation_history" TEXT /* History of conservation for the artwork */,
  "loan_history" TEXT /* History of loans for the artwork */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., curator, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the CMS */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the artwork was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exhibitions" (
  "exhibition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exhibition */,
  "exhibition_title" TEXT /* Title of the exhibition */,
  "exhibition_date" TEXT /* Date of the exhibition */,
  "exhibition_location" TEXT /* Location of the exhibition */,
  "artwork_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the artworks in the exhibition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exhibition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of the publication */,
  "publication_author" TEXT /* Author of the publication */,
  "artwork_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the artworks in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_records" (
  "conservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation record */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork the conservation record belongs to */,
  "conservation_date" TEXT /* Date of the conservation */,
  "conservation_description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conservation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_records" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan record */,
  "artwork_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artwork the loan record belongs to */,
  "loan_date" TEXT /* Date of the loan */,
  "loan_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the loan in months */,
  "loan_location" TEXT /* Location of the loan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id")
)
